title: Reforged Axes
description: Small tweaks to the axes textures
body:
# Reforged Axes ![gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea8813d3de7c1d05d546c43aa3b238f61aefa8e2.gif)
This resource pack subtly alters the **axe textures** in the **Bare Bones style**, giving them a more **combat-ready** appearance. It's perfectly suited for **vanilla gameplay**. It does not require OptiFine or any other dependencies to function.

## **![Modified textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/562c020f8efabab7447c53641966c6b8e4d95902.png)**
